lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੩ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 ghar 3 asattapadeea |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl, Third House, Ashtpadheeyaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਭ੍ਰਮਤੇ ਭ੍ਰਮਤੇ ਦੁਲਭ ਜਨਮੁ ਅਬ ਪਾਇਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh bhramate bhramate dulabh janam ab paaeo |1|
lines.english: Wandering and roaming through 8.4 million incarnations, you have now been given this human life, so difficult to obtain. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮੂੜੇ ਤੂ ਹੋਛੈ ਰਸਿ ਲਪਟਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: re moorre too hochhai ras lapattaaeo |
lines.english: You fool! You are attached and clinging to such trivial pleasures!

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਸਤੁ ਹੈ ਤੇਰੈ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਸਿਉ ਉਰਝਾਇਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: amrit sang basat hai terai bikhiaa siau urajhaaeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Nectar abides with you, but you are engrossed in sin and corruption. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਜਵੇਹਰ ਬਨਜਨਿ ਆਇਓ ਕਾਲਰੁ ਲਾਦਿ ਚਲਾਇਓ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ratan javehar banajan aaeo kaalar laad chalaaeo |2|
lines.english: You have come to trade in gems and jewels, but you have loaded only barren soil. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਟਲ ਅਖੰਡ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਸੁਖਦਾਈ ਇਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਨਹੀ ਤੁਝੁ ਗਾਇਓ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: attal akhandd praan sukhadaaee ik nimakh nahee tujh gaaeo |4|
lines.english: He is immovable, indestructible, the Giver of peace to the soul; and yet you do not sing His Praises, even for an instant. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਰਹਨਾ ਬਸਨਾ ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਚੀਤਿ ਨ ਆਇਓ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jih ghar meh tudh rahanaa basanaa so ghar cheet na aaeo |3|
lines.english: That home within which you live - you have not kept that home in your thoughts. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹਾ ਜਾਣਾ ਸੋ ਥਾਨੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਓ ਇਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਨਹੀ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਇਓ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jahaa jaanaa so thaan visaario ik nimakh nahee man laaeo |5|
lines.english: You have forgotten that place where you must go; you have not attached your mind to the Lord, even for an instant. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਕੋ ਲਾਇਓ ਤਿਤ ਹੀ ਲਾਗਾ ਤੈਸੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇਓ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jit ko laaeo tith hee laagaa taise karam kamaaeo |7|
lines.english: As God links the mortals, so are they linked, and so are the deeds they do. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਕਲਤ੍ਰ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਦੇਖਿ ਸਮਗ੍ਰੀ ਇਸ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਉਰਝਾਇਓ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: putr kalatr grih dekh samagree is hee meh urajhaaeo |6|
lines.english: Gazing upon your children, spouse, household and paraphernalia, you are entangled in them. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਭਇਓ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਤਾ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਓ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: jau bheo kripaal taa saadhasang paaeaa jan naanak braham dhiaaeo |8|1|
lines.english: When He becomes Merciful, then the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, is found; servant Nanak meditates on God. ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਰਸੁ ਰਸਨਾ ਉਚਾਰੈ ਮਿਸਟ ਗੂੜਾ ਰੰਗੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har naam ras rasanaa uchaarai misatt goorraa rang |1|
lines.english: My tongue lovingly chants the Lord's Name; this love is so sweet and intense! ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੀਨੋ ਭਇਓ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: kar anugrahu raakh leeno bheo saadhoo sang |
lines.english: Granting His Grace, He has protected me; I have found the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਾਨ ਕੋ ਅਸਥਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: mere maan ko asathaan |
lines.english: He is the place of rest for my mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੀਤ ਸਾਜਨ ਸਖਾ ਬੰਧਪੁ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਜਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: meet saajan sakhaa bandhap antarajaamee jaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: my friend, companion, associate and relative; He is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਰਾਧੇ ਜਮਕੰਕਰੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਨ ਕਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur prasaadee prabh araadhe jamakankar kichh na kahee |2|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I worship and adore God; the Messenger of Death can't say anything to me. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾਰ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਉਪਾਇਓ ਸਰਣਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਗਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: sansaar saagar jin upaaeo saran prabh kee gahee |
lines.english: He created the world-ocean; I seek the Sanctuary of that God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਦਾ ਰਾਖਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jeea jugat sujaan suaamee sadaa raakhanahaar |3|
lines.english: The all-knowing Lord and Master shows us the true way of life; He is our Savior and Protector forever. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਖ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਦੁਆਰਿ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਤ ਰਿਦਾ ਭੰਡਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: mokh mukat duaar jaa kai sant ridaa bhanddaar |
lines.english: Emancipation and liberation are at His Door; He is the treasure in the hearts of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਰਤੁ ਨਰਕੁ ਅਸਥਾਨ ਬਿਖੜੇ ਬਿਖੁ ਨ ਪੋਹੈ ਤਾਹਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: mirat narak asathaan bikharre bikh na pohai taeh |4|
lines.english: Death, hell and the most horrible dwelling of sin and corruption cannot even touch such a person. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਦਰਦ ਕਲੇਸ ਬਿਨਸਹਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਬਸੈ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: dookh darad kales binaseh jis basai man maeh |
lines.english: Pain, suffering and troubles are eradicated, when the Lord abides in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਾ ਪਰਵਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: ridh sidh nav nidh jaa kai amritaa paravaah |
lines.english: Wealth, miraculous spiritual powers and the nine treasures come from the Lord, as do the streams of Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਦੇਵ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਬੇਦ ਕਰਹਿ ਉਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sidh saadhik dev mun jan bed kareh uchaar |
lines.english: The Siddhas, seekers, angelic beings, silent sages, and the Vedas speak of Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਅੰਤੇ ਮਧਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਊਚ ਅਗਮ ਅਗਾਹ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aad ante madh pooran aooch agam agaah |5|
lines.english: In the beginning, in the middle, and in the end, He is perfect, lofty, unapproachable and unfathomable. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜਿ ਭੁੰਚਹਿ ਨਹੀ ਅੰਤੁ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: simar suaamee sukh sehaj bhuncheh nahee ant paaraavaar |6|
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Lord and Master, celestial peace is enjoyed; He has no end or limitation. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਪ੍ਰਾਛਤ ਮਿਟਹਿ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਜਪਿ ਭਗਵਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: anik praachhat mitteh khin meh ridai jap bhagavaan |
lines.english: Countless sins are erased in an instant, meditating on the Benevolent Lord within the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਵਨਾ ਤੇ ਮਹਾ ਪਾਵਨ ਕੋਟਿ ਦਾਨ ਇਸਨਾਨ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: paavanaa te mahaa paavan kott daan isanaan |7|
lines.english: Such a person becomes the purest of the pure, and is blessed with the merits of millions of donations to charity and cleansing baths. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਨਿਮਖ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥੮॥੨॥
lines.translit: bisar naahee nimakh man te naanak kee aradaas |8|2|
lines.english: May I never forget Him from my mind, even for an instant - this is Nanak's prayer. ||8||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲ ਬੁਧਿ ਸੁਧਿ ਪਰਾਣ ਸਰਬਸੁ ਸੰਤਨਾ ਕੀ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: bal budh sudh paraan sarabas santanaa kee raas |
lines.english: God is power, intellect, understanding, the breath of life, wealth, and everything for the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਸਤ੍ਰਿ ਤੀਖਣਿ ਕਾਟਿ ਡਾਰਿਓ ਮਨਿ ਨ ਕੀਨੋ ਰੋਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sasatr teekhan kaatt ddaario man na keeno ros |
lines.english: The sharp tool cuts down the tree, but it does not feel anger in its mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਜੁ ਉਆ ਕੋ ਲੇ ਸਵਾਰਿਓ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਦੀਨੋ ਦੋਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaaj uaa ko le savaario til na deeno dos |1|
lines.english: It serves the purpose of the cutter, and does not blame him at all. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆਲ ਦੇਵ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਸੁਨਿ ਸੰਤਨਾ ਕੀ ਰੀਤਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: deaal dev kripaal gobind sun santanaa kee reet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is merciful, divine and compassionate. Listen - this is the way of the Saints. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਰਉ ਨਿਤ ਨੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: man mere raam rau nit neet |
lines.english: O my mind, continually, continuously, meditate on the Lord.
